ValidationRule.description: SAL23-508 AAR What & Why Section Required if ACV>50k for Opportunities belongs to AMER Theatre
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( CONTAINS(Opportunity__r.ETM_Theatre__c, 'AMER'), Opportunity__r.ACV_Amount__c > 50000 , OR( ISBLANK( AAR_What_would_we_do_different_next_time__c ), ISBLANK( AAR_What_didn_t_work__c ), ISBLANK( AAR_What_did_we_think_would_happen__c ), ISBLANK( AAR_What_really_happened__c ), ISBLANK( AAR_What_was_the_difference__c ), ISBLANK( AAR_What_worked_well__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Opportunity ACV > 50k, please ensure all the fields in What and why section are populated.
